title: Presentation: Architecting a Centralized Platform for Data Deletion at Netflix
summary: The speakers discuss the architectural challenges of executing safe data deletion across distributed datastores. They share lessons on controlling tombstone accumulation, building continuous audit loops, and gaining trust with a centralized platform. By Vidhya Arvind, Shawn Liu
